description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 3 hrs 48 mins coding, averaging 1 hr 6 mins per day. His WakaTime activity spanned 2 projects and was mostly in Markdown, Python, SQL, Other, and TOML. On GitHub, he opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, from #106 through #117.
